---
name: Security advisory
about: Privately report a security vulnerability
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security"]
assignees: []
---

**⚠️ Do not file security issues publicly. ⚠️**

If you have found a security vulnerability in atemporal, please
follow the responsible disclosure process in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md):

- Email **security@atemporal.dev** (PGP key in `docs/security/pgp.asc`).
- Or open a [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/NaturalDevCR/atemporal/security/advisories/new).

This template is for **non-sensitive** security *questions* (e.g.
"is this pattern safe?") only.
